title: Security audit of all changes
description: Full security review focusing on: DB integrity and supply chain risks, cache poisoning vectors, path traversal in new shard paths, OSV API response validation, SSRF prevention in new connector. Agent: security-auditor

comments.author: Adam
comments.text: Security audit COMPLETE ✅ | M-1 fixed (Windows path separator), L-1 through L-4 documented | Merged to main as commit 8535f38

title: Fix shard path alignment between update script and reader
description: Critical path mismatch: Update script writes to data/packages/{name}.json with @scope__pkg encoding. Reader primary path is data/{name}.json with @scope/name.json. Reader falls back to legacy packages/ path. Every lookup takes two filesystem attempts. Fix update script to write to reader primary path convention. Files: scripts/update-vuln-db.ts

comments.author: Adam
comments.text: Shepherd: APPROVE ✅ | Watchdog: APPROVE ✅ (412 tests pass) | Merged to main as commit 12424f6

title: Create OSV.dev vulnerability source connector
description: Add OSV.dev as vulnerability source. Plumbing exists: types.ts:5 declares VulnerabilityIdType OSV, semver.ts:54 has isVersionAffectedByOsvSemverRange() fully implemented but never called, connector.ts has VulnerabilitySource interface. Create src/databases/osv.ts implementing VulnerabilitySource using OSV batch API (POST https://api.osv.dev/v1/querybatch). Wire into aggregator. Add sources.osv config. Free API, no auth, generous limits. Would expand coverage from 1,911 to 50k+ packages. Files: src/databases/osv.ts (new), src/databases/aggregator.ts, src/config.ts, src/types.ts

comments.author: Adam
comments.text: Shepherd: APPROVE ✅ | Watchdog: APPROVE ✅ (367 tests pass, 35 OSV-specific tests) | Merged to main as commit 41b2b18

title: Add DB optimization step to build pipeline
description: After copying static DB to dist/, invoke optimizeIndex() and compressDatabase() from optimizer.ts. Currently scripts/copy-static-db.js does raw fs.cp() and scripts/bundle.js never calls the optimizer. reader.ts already handles .json.gz transparently. Will shrink npm tarball ~3-5x using existing tested code. Files: scripts/copy-static-db.js, scripts/bundle.js

comments.author: Adam
comments.text: Shepherd: APPROVE ✅ | Watchdog: APPROVE ✅ (414 tests pass, build verified, 4.3MB→3.4MB DB compression) | Merged to main as commit f87eb98

title: Create GitHub Actions workflow for automated weekly DB updates
description: Create .github/workflows/update-vuln-db.yml. Weekly cron (Sunday 03:00 UTC) that: 1) Checks out repo, sets up Node 20 + pnpm, 2) Runs pnpm run update-vuln-db:incremental, 3) Runs optimizer/compressor on output, 4) Creates PR via peter-evans/create-pull-request. ~30-40 lines of YAML. Needs GITHUB_TOKEN with contents:write + pull-requests:write. This is the single highest-value fix. Files: .github/workflows/update-vuln-db.yml

title: pnpm-audit-hook: Comprehensive Improvement Plan
description: Full improvement roadmap covering: 1) No automated DB updates (biggest gap), 2) DB shipped uncompressed despite optimizer code existing, 3) Only GitHub Advisory source (OSV plumbing unused), 4) Thin coverage (1,911 vs 50k+ on OSV), 5) No DB integrity verification, 6) DB bundled in tarball (~9MB), 7) No schema version check, 8) Cache keys miss DB version, 9) CLI error handling, 10) No minification, 11) Stale package-lock.json, 12) No --update-db CLI flag, 13) Zero test coverage for update script. All 13 issues verified against codebase.

title: Add DB manifest hash for integrity verification
description: Shards read via readMaybeCompressed() then JSON.parse() with no signature or hash check. A tampered node_modules shard could silently suppress findings. At build time: compute SHA-256 of all shard contents, store in index.json integrity field. At load time: optionally verify (behind config flag for performance). Closes supply chain risk. Files: scripts/update-vuln-db.ts, src/static-db/reader.ts, src/static-db/types.ts

comments.author: Adam
comments.text: Shepherd: APPROVE ✅ | Watchdog: APPROVE ✅ (74/74 integrity tests, 1911 shard hashes) | Merged to main as commit c78cd1d

title: Add schema version guard to static DB reader
description: reader.ts line 299 only checks for 'ver' in data to detect optimized vs standard format but never validates the actual schemaVersion number. Add: if (index.schemaVersion > SUPPORTED_SCHEMA_VERSION) warn and handle gracefully. Prevents silent data misinterpretation when schema evolves. Files: src/static-db/reader.ts

title: Enable esbuild minification and fix missing externals
description: scripts/bundle.js has minify: false and is missing externals: node:crypto (file-cache.ts), node:stream (optimizer.ts), node:stream/promises (optimizer.ts). Set minify: true and add missing externals. Files: scripts/bundle.js

title: Include DB version in cache keys to invalidate on DB update
description: Cache keys in github-advisory.ts are github:registryUrl:pkg@ver:after=cutoffDate. Includes cutoffDate but NOT static DB lastUpdated timestamp. When DB is updated but cutoffDate stays same, old cached findings not re-evaluated until TTL expires. Fix: include DB lastUpdated or index hash in cache key. Files: src/databases/github-advisory.ts

title: Add --update-db flag to pnpm-audit-scan CLI
description: Users must know npm script name (pnpm run update-vuln-db:incremental) to update DB. A --update-db flag on pnpm-audit-scan would be more discoverable. bin/cli.js handles: --format, --severity, --offline, --quiet, --verbose, --debug, --config, --help, --version. No update flag exists. title: Document Azure DevOps output format and fix deprecated GitHub Actions syntax
description: output-formatter.ts has full formatAzureDevOps() function and azure format support, but README only mentions text, json, github-actions. PNPM_AUDIT_FORMAT env var doesn't document azure. Also GitHub Actions format uses deprecated ::set-output syntax (deprecated Oct 2022) - should use GITHUB_OUTPUT env file. Files: README.md, src/utils/output-formatter.ts

title: Improve bin/cli.js error handling for missing dist/
description: bin/cli.js line 113 does require('../dist/index.js') inside main() with only generic catch. Error is: 'Audit error: Cannot find module...'. The .pnpmfile.cjs handles this gracefully with detailed fix instructions. CLI should match that pattern. Files: bin/cli.js

title: Evaluate separating DB into independent package
description: Currently entire DB (~9MB uncompressed) bundled in npm tarball via dist/. Every pnpm install downloads all 1,911+ shard files. Evaluate: 1) Separate @pnpm-audit-hook/db package for independent versioning, 2) Lazy-fetch from CDN with version pinning, 3) Keep bundled with compression. Document as ADR. Architectural decision, not immediate code.
